data.description: SUPER MICRO COMPUTER CONFIRMS INDEPENDENT INVESTIGATION INTO MARCH 2026 INDICTMENT OF THREE ASSOCIATED INDIVIDUALS; INITIATES INTERNAL REVIEW OF GLOBAL TRADE COMPLIANCE PROGRAM & APPOINTS DEANNA LUNA AS ACTING CHIEF COMPLIANCE OFFICER

data.title: AXT, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release for April 30, 2026
data.description: FREMONT, California—AXT, Inc., a prominent manufacturer of compound semiconductor substrates listed on NasdaqGS as AXTI, is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 through a press release scheduled immediately after market closure on April 30, 2026. Following this, the company will conduct a conference call to delve into these results on the same day at 1:30 p.m. PT. Interested parties can join the call by dialing (833) 461-5787 with the passcode 619252830, or alternatively, tune in live at www.axt.com.

data.title: SLB OneSubsea and Subsea7 Sign Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname
data.description: Houston-based energy technology firm SLB (NYSE: SLB) has recently revealed a strategic partnership deal with PETRONAS Suriname E&P B.V., which is a subsidiary of PETRONAS, and Subsea Integration Alliance, including SLB OneSubsea and Subsea7. The main objective of this collaboration is to tap into resources in Suriname’s developing frontier basin utilizing efficient and inventive subsea methods. Through this agreement, a lasting framework for cooperation has been established to facilitate this endeavor.

data.title: Logitech Announces Date for Release of Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Financial Results for FY 2026
data.description: Logitech International (SIX: LOGN) (Nasdaq: LOGI) has revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 on May 5, 2026. The announcement is scheduled for 1:00 p.m. Pacific Daylight Time (PDT) and 10:00 p.m. Central European Summer Time (CEST). Following the release, a videoconference to analyze the results will take place at 1:30 p.m. PDT and 10:30 p.m. CEST on the same day. The event can be livestreamed on the Logitech corporate website.

data.title: Arista Networks to Announce Q1 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
data.description: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE: ANET) is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, after the U.S. markets close on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The information will be shared through a press release containing financial details, accessible on the Investor Relations section of the Arista website at https://investors.arista.com. An executive management conference call will take place on the same day, starting at 1:30 PM.

data.title: Extreme Networks Schedules Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
data.description: Extreme revealed that they will be reporting their financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on March 31, 2026. These results are scheduled to be released before the market opens on April 29, 2026, indicating an upcoming important financial update from the company.

data.title: Okami Medical Announces First Patient Enrolled in ALPHA Registry
data.description: In Aliso Viejo, California, on April 7, 2026, Okami Medical, a leading medical technology firm specializing in innovative vascular embolization solutions, revealed the initiation of the ALPHA Registry, enrolling the initial patient. This registry is a prospective, multicenter initiative aimed at assessing the safety and effectiveness of their latest technologies.

data.title: Skillsoft Reports Financial Results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of Fiscal 2026
data.description: Skillsoft Corp. (NYSE: SKIL) has disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on January 31, 2026. The company, known for its AI-native skills management platform, reported total revenue of $131 million for the fourth quarter, a slight decrease from the previous year's $134 million. Talent Development Solutions Revenue stood at $103 million. Looking ahead, Skillsoft provided its TDS Segment financial outlook for the full fiscal year 2027.

data.title: Pega to Announce Financial Results for the First Quarter of 2026 and Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Pegasystems Inc., a leading Enterprise Transformation Company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol PEGA, is set to release its financial results for Q1 of 2026 on April 21, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a conference call and audio-only webcast the following day, April 22, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EDT. Interested individuals and investors can participate in the Q&A session by dialing 1 (800) 715-9871 (domestic).

data.title: Supermicro Provides Update on Investigation by Independent Board Directors
data.description: A recent report from SAN JOSE, Calif., states that Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) has affirmed the initiation of an independent probe related to the March 2026 indictment involving three individuals affiliated with the company during that period. The investigation follows the indictment of two employees and a contractor on March 19, 2026, for their alleged involvement in a conspiracy to perpetrate export-control infractions. While Supermicro has not been specifically named in the indictment, the probe is currently ongoing.

data.title: Subsea7 and SLB OneSubsea Sign  Strategic Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed a strategic collaboration deal involving PETRONAS Suriname E&P B.V. and Subsea Integration Alliance. The alliance, consisting of Subsea 7 and SLB OneSubsea, solidified a partnership for joint work on field development projects in Suriname. This agreement signifies a lasting commitment to cooperation and coordination between the parties involved.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. to Host Conference Call on Its First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Rutland, Vermont, on April 7th, 2026, Casella Waste Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CWST), a company specializing in solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, has announced that it will be disclosing its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31st. These results are scheduled to be unveiled after the markets close on Thursday, April 30th, 2026.

data.title: GRAIL Announces Integration of the Galleri® Test into Epic Electronic Health Record Platform to Expand Access Nationwide
data.description: A partnership has been established that will provide around 450 health systems with access to Galleri test results through their current patient portal. This collaboration with Epic will allow clinicians to easily order the Galleri Multi-Cancer Early Detection Test while treating patients. This integration aims to enhance healthcare effectiveness and streamline the process for approximately 450 health systems.

data.title: Insmed Provides Clinical Update on Phase 2b CEDAR Study
data.description: Insmed Incorporated announced that a recent study focusing on brensocatib did not reach its primary or secondary efficacy goals. Consequently, the company has decided to halt the program for treating HS. Despite this setback, the safety profile of brensocatib remains in line with earlier studies, with no new safety concerns detected for either dosage used. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, from the company's headquarters in Bridgewater, New Jersey.

data.title: Amneal to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 1, 2026
data.description: Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMRX) based in Bridgewater, N.J., revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Friday, May 1, 2026, before the market opens. The Company is set to have an audio webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: ZIEGLER CLOSES $86,215,000 FINANCING FOR MENNONITE VILLAGE (OR)
data.description: Announced in Chicago on April 7, 2026, a specialty investment bank, Ziegler, has successfully closed on $86,215,000 Series 2026AB Bonds (referred to as the "Bonds") for Mennonite Village. This transaction was facilitated through the Hospital Facility Authority of the City of Albany, Oregon. The funds will support Mennonite Home of Albany...

data.title: EPAM Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Newtown-based EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) announced that they will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, May 7, 2026, to review their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. EPAM is a prominent company specializing in digital transformation services and product engineering. The call will offer insights into key financial figures and strategic developments during this period.

data.title: Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. Hosts First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. (NYSE:CFR) announced a forthcoming conference call scheduled for April 30, 2026, to address the first quarter financial results of 2026. The earnings release for Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. will be accessible at around 8:00 AM on the same day. This event signifies a significant update for investors and stakeholders of the company, providing an opportunity to delve into the performance numbers of the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Aircastle to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on April 21, 2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Stamford-based Aircastle Limited revealed its intention to unveil its financial results for Q4 and the full year ended on February 28, 2026. The report is scheduled to be released on April 21, 2026, before the market opens.
